## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Testing

- [ ] Tests written before implementation (TDD)
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy src/` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit message (`feat(module): description`)
- [ ] All public APIs have docstrings and type hints
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Integration tests added if touching Dapr or database code
